rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation (with Andrews et al. 2002b) in the practical-guidelines discussion. It is used to support a broad background claim that heterogeneity-distribution choice may sometimes be less critical, not to build a specific hypothesis, derive a mechanism, or implement a method from that paper. The citing article's core contribution (posterior predictive checks for MVN heterogeneity) is developed independently of this reference.
